pi_items.source: Code verification: Task description specifies target volume name as 'employee_db_data'; verified in verifier.py line 61 checking for volume_name == 'employee_db_data'
Code verification: setup_task.sh line 31 specifies container_name: employee-db in docker-compose configuration
Code verification: setup_task.sh lines 74-80 generate exactly 100 employee records via Python loop range(100); line 91 verifies count equals 100
Code verification: setup_task.sh line 33 sets POSTGRES_USER: postgres environment variable
Code verification: setup_task.sh line 34 sets POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password environment variable
Code verification: setup_task.sh line 35 sets POSTGRES_DB: employees environment variable

privileged_info_summary: This Docker volume migration task uses synthetic data: 100 randomly generated employee records created during setup in the PostgreSQL 14 container named 'employee-db'. The project directory is /home/ga/projects/employee-db with database credentials: user 'postgres', password 'password', database 'employees'. The task requires migrating storage from a bind mount (./pgdata) to a Docker Named Volume named 'employee_db_data' while preserving all 100 records.
